pi_items.source: Task description explicitly requires the creation of a patient with Name 'Marcus Delgado'.
Task description explicitly requires setting the Date of Birth to '1978-11-22'.
Task description explicitly requires setting Sex to 'Male'.
Task description explicitly requires setting Blood Type to 'A+'.
Task description explicitly requires setting Marital Status to 'Married'.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to enter a completely synthetic patient record into the GNU Health system. All target attributes (Name 'Marcus Delgado', DOB '1978-11-22', Sex 'Male', Blood Type 'A+', Marital Status 'Married', and Doctor 'Cordara, Cameron') are explicitly defined in the task description. The setup_task.sh script ensures idempotency by preemptively querying and deleting any pre-existing patient named 'Marcus Delgado' from the database before the task begins.
